title: Looking Back From the End of Your Life
subtitle: A visualisation for meeting the woman you will have become, and receiving what she wants you to know about the life well-built
excerpt: A short visualisation from the Day 84 theme of a 12-week money programme. You sit with a future version of yourself at the end of a long, rich life, not a fantasy, a fact. She looks back at where you are now and tells you what she wants you to know.
sourceNotes: Original visualisation created for homemade.education, drawing on the Day 84 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

content.text: A short visualisation for the Day 84 theme: anchor abundance as who I am forever. The image is the end of a long life, and the woman who lived it looking back at you now.
Sit comfortably. Close your eyes or let your gaze soften.

Picture a woman at the end of a long, full life. She is calm. She has built something real. The wealth she accumulated was real: money, time, relationships, choices made from abundance rather than fear.
She looks back to where you are now. She is not critical. She is generous. She has lived what you are still choosing, and she wants you to know something.
Let her speak. Do not try to shape what she says. Just receive it.
Sit with her for a moment.
Open your eyes when you are ready. Write down what she said if something came.
Original to homemade.education. Draws on the Day 84 theme of MONEY: A 12-Week Tapping Program (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
